incident_refractive_index.description: Incident-medium refractive index used by the ideal model

transmitted_refractive_index.description: Transmitted-medium refractive index used by the ideal model

sweep_start_angle_deg.description: First incident angle in the numerical sweep

sweep_stop_angle_deg.description: Last incident angle in the numerical sweep

sweep_step_angle_deg.description: Incident-angle spacing in the numerical sweep

index_ratio.description: Ratio of transmitted to incident refractive index

grid_minimum_angle_deg.description: Angle of minimum p-polarized reflectance on the numerical grid

grid_angle_error_deg.description: Absolute difference between analytic and grid-minimum angles

analytic_p_reflectance.description: P-polarized power reflectance at the analytic Brewster angle

analytic_s_reflectance.description: S-polarized power reflectance at the analytic Brewster angle

analytic_unpolarized_reflectance.description: Mean s/p power reflectance at the analytic Brewster angle

grid_minimum_p_reflectance.description: Minimum p-polarized power reflectance on the numerical grid

maximum_energy_balance_error.description: Maximum absolute R plus T minus one residual across the sweep

analytic_p_reflectance_tolerance.description: Maximum p-polarized reflectance accepted by the analytic-null check

grid_angle_tolerance_deg.description: Maximum angle error accepted by the grid check

energy_balance_tolerance.description: Maximum R plus T minus one residual accepted by the energy check

sweep_sample_count.description: Number of incident angles in the numerical sweep

analytic_null_within_tolerance.description: Whether analytic p reflectance satisfies the declared null tolerance

grid_angle_within_tolerance.description: Whether the numerical minimum satisfies the declared angle tolerance

energy_balance_within_tolerance.description: Whether every swept s/p result satisfies the declared energy tolerance
